title: compat attach: fix write on closed channel
body:
Waiting on an initialized sync.WaitGroup returns immediately.
Hence, move the goroutine to wait and close *after* reading
the logs.

Fixes: #12904
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

@mheon PTAL

There was still an open comment (see https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/12909#discussion_r786898228). I'll open a follow-up PR. I had a look yesterday but it turns out to be an origami-bug: slowly unfolding into something bigger.
